rootCause.competingOwners: client-insurer-operational-directory-owner rewrites portal and bank rows even when the canonical module is in edit mode, replacing editable controls with read-only cards.
rootCause.snapshotContractMismatch: client-insurer-edit-owner removes data-cuso while modules/aseguradoras.js still dereferences data-cuso.value; bank snapshot, add and delete then fail.
rootCause.fakeAccountCreation: The add-account handler creates a random masked placeholder instead of a blank dynamic resource with stable identity.
rootCause.currentTabNotCommitted: guardarDraft computes the diff without first forcing snapshotTab for the currently open tab.
rootCause.injectedUsernameNotWired: Username input is injected after module wiring and is not a first-class draft field.
rootCause.credentialMutationBlocked: The prior edit owner declares passwordInputForbidden instead of routing authorized password changes through the secure credential provider.
rootCause.writeAcknowledgementMissing: The Firestore LAB adapter is optimistic; the module closes edit mode without waiting for orbit:backend:write-ok or handling orbit:backend:write-error.
rootCause.autoadministrationGap: Mutable tenant business configuration still exists in static tenant JavaScript. Production readiness requires dynamic configuracion_catalogo/store ownership and admin UI, not additional hardcoded values.

workPlanPriority.productionGate: All listed modules must be operational, persistent, role-correct and dynamically configurable before production authorization.
workPlanPriority.tariffKnowledge: Preserve mapped evidence now; integrate and expose it per insurer with Cotizador/Comparativo without blocking the operational directory repair.

nextAllowedStep: Build one direct canonical patch in modules/aseguradoras.js plus minimal owner compatibility: dynamic bank and portal CRUD, secure credential mutation by authorized roles, current-tab snapshot, backend write acknowledgement, honest errors, stable IDs and no fake or mutable operational values in code. Then run the binding static preflight before any Hosting or browser review.
